description: DERMAGEN Egensia Cream is an intensive post-procedure recovery cream formulated with Centella Asiatica extract, EGF (epidermal growth factor), salmon egg extract, copper tripeptide-1, ceramide complex, and shea butter. These ingredients work synergistically to reinforce the skin barrier, support epidermal regeneration, and reduce post-laser redness and sensitivity. The combination of growth factors and barrier lipids makes it particularly suited for use after ablative and non-ablative laser procedures.
protocol: For home and clinic use following laser or aesthetic procedures. Apply a thin layer to thoroughly cleansed skin twice daily, morning and evening, gently pressing in until fully absorbed. Begin application immediately after the procedure and continue throughout the recovery period. Use for a minimum of 2 weeks post-treatment, or as directed by the practitioner.

description: Dr. PICOS Egencica Cream is a 60 g post-dermal care cream developed for sensitive and reactive skin following aesthetic procedures. The formulation delivers targeted comfort, barrier-supportive hydration, and a conditioning effect suited to delicate facial zones. It is designed to be gentle enough for skin in an active recovery phase while providing meaningful moisture retention.
protocol: For home and clinic use. Apply a thin layer to cleansed, dried skin twice daily after aesthetic procedures, gently patting in until absorbed. Continue throughout the full post-procedure recovery period. Adjust frequency based on skin sensitivity and practitioner guidance.

description: Dr. Picos RMV Repair Cream is a rich 200 g barrier-replenishing daily cream designed to support the skin's moisture balance and aid recovery after professional aesthetic treatments. Its formulation provides a calming, conditioning feel suited to skin under physiological stress, including post-treatment dryness, sensitivity, and compromised barrier function. The large-format tube makes it practical for use across both face and body.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply liberally to cleansed skin morning and evening, focusing on dry or recovering areas, and massage gently in upward motions until fully absorbed. May be applied to both face and body. Continue throughout the recovery period as directed by the treating practitioner.

description: Dr. Picos Ureanol Cream is a 200 g intensive moisturizing cream formulated with urea as its principal keratolytic and humectant active, targeting very dry, rough, and thickened skin areas on the body. Urea binds water within the stratum corneum, softens thickened epidermis through keratolytic action, and supports the natural moisture factor of the skin surface. The formulation is particularly effective on elbows, heels, knees, and chronically dry patches.
protocol: For daily home use on body and problem areas. Apply an appropriate amount to affected zones once or twice daily and massage thoroughly until fully absorbed. For very thickened or fissured areas, apply under occlusion overnight for enhanced penetration. Continue regularly for at least 4 weeks for optimal keratolytic benefit.

description: Cindelria Tone-Up Sun Cream is a brightening tinted sunscreen with SPF50+ PA++++ broad-spectrum UV protection, formulated with Centella Asiatica extract, aloe vera, and a soft-focus pigment complex to instantly unify and brighten the complexion. The formula provides both physical UV filtration via titanium dioxide and chemical UV filters while delivering a natural pink-tinted finish that reduces the appearance of dullness. It is designed as the final step of the morning skincare routine.
protocol: For daily home use. Dispense a small pearl-sized amount and apply evenly to the face and neck as the closing step of the morning skincare routine, after serums and moisturizer. Reapply approximately every two hours during prolonged outdoor or sun exposure, or after sweating and towelling.

description: DERMAGEN Soothing Mask is a post-procedure sheet mask formulated with glycerin, panthenol, allantoin, aloe barbadensis leaf juice powder, hydrolyzed collagen, and sodium hyaluronate to rapidly soothe, hydrate, and protect skin after laser or aesthetic procedures. The ingredients create a moist recovery environment that reduces redness, swelling, and irritation, while the collagen and hyaluronate complex supports moisture retention in recovering epidermis. Supplied as 10 individually packed sheets at 23 g per sheet.
protocol: For home or clinic use following laser or aesthetic procedures. Apply one sheet to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave in place for 15 to 20 minutes, then remove and gently pat any remaining essence into the skin until absorbed. Follow with a suitable recovery cream. Use 2 to 3 times per week during the post-procedure recovery period.

description: DERMAGEN Well-spot Hydrocolloid is an ultra-thin, hypoallergenic hydrocolloid spot patch that creates a moist wound-healing environment over active blemishes, post-extraction spots, and minor superficial wounds. The hydrocolloid matrix absorbs excess exudate and sebum, promotes faster epidermal closure, and provides a physical barrier against secondary contamination and picking. Each patch measures approximately 1.2 cm diameter and is discreet enough for daytime or overnight wear.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply one patch to clean, thoroughly dry skin directly over the target blemish or spot, pressing gently at the edges to ensure full adhesion. Leave in place until the patch turns opaque (indicating exudate absorption), then replace with a fresh patch. Repeat until the lesion has resolved. May be worn under makeup.

description: DERMAGEN White Sun Cream is a triple-function SPF50+ PA++++ sunscreen formulated with glutathione, Centella Asiatica extract, niacinamide, adenosine, ethylhexyl triazone, and titanium dioxide to deliver simultaneous broad-spectrum UV protection, melanin-inhibiting brightening action, and smoothing anti-aging care. Niacinamide suppresses melanosome transfer to keratinocytes, glutathione further inhibits tyrosinase, and Centella Asiatica supports barrier integrity in post-procedure skin. Suitable as the final morning step for sensitive and post-laser complexions.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply an even layer to thoroughly cleansed and moisturized skin as the closing step of the morning routine. Reapply approximately every two hours during prolonged sun exposure, after sweating, or after towelling. Use consistently as part of a daily brightening maintenance protocol.

description: DERMAGEN Urea Cream is a 100 g keratolytic emollient cream with urea as its key active ingredient, supplemented with squalane and tocopheryl acetate. Urea at its working concentration loosens corneocyte cohesion to exfoliate dry, thickened epidermis, binds water within the stratum corneum, and reduces itch by desensitizing C-fibre nerve endings. The squalane component reinforces the lipid barrier while tocopheryl acetate provides antioxidant protection for compromised skin.
protocol: For daily home use on rough body areas. Apply an appropriate amount to affected zones once or twice daily, massaging thoroughly into the skin until fully absorbed. For heavily thickened or fissured skin on heels and elbows, apply under light occlusion overnight for enhanced keratolytic effect. Consistent daily use over 4 to 6 weeks is recommended for optimal results.

description: DERMAGEN RM Repair Cream is a 200 g daily moisturizing barrier-restoration cream developed to support post-laser and post-procedure recovery and maintain optimal epidermal hydration. The formulation delivers replenishing, conditioning care to compromised facial skin, helping to restore moisture balance and comfort during the active healing phase. Its generous format supports both home use and clinic-dispensed post-treatment protocols.
protocol: For home and clinic use. Apply a thin even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin morning and evening, massaging gently across the face and neck until fully absorbed. Begin use immediately following in-clinic procedures and continue throughout the recovery period, or as directed by the treating practitioner.

description: DERMAGEN Scargel is a transparent silicone-based gel dressing in a 15 g tube that forms a thin, breathable, semi-occlusive film over healing scar tissue. The silicone matrix maintains an optimal moisture balance at the scar surface, moderates collagen synthesis to help flatten hypertrophic and keloid scars, and protects the area from mechanical trauma. Regular use softens scar texture and reduces redness, firmness, and elevation over time.
protocol: For daily home use. Clean and dry the scar area thoroughly, then apply a thin layer of gel directly over the target scar twice daily. Allow the gel to dry completely before covering with clothing or dressings. For optimal remodelling results, use consistently for a minimum of 3 months on post-surgical or post-trauma scars. May be used in conjunction with pressure garments.

description: DERMAGEN Centellase Ointment is a 50 g quasi-drug topical ointment based on Centella Asiatica extract (centellase), indicated for the supportive care of superficial wounds and skin ulcers. Centellase stimulates fibroblast proliferation, promotes collagen synthesis, and improves wound epithelialization, supporting faster and more organized tissue repair. The ointment base provides a semi-occlusive barrier that maintains wound moisture and shields from external contamination.
protocol: For home and clinic use. Cleanse the wound or affected area gently and pat dry, then apply a thin layer of ointment directly to the wound surface once or twice daily, or as directed by the packaging instructions or a qualified healthcare professional. Cover with an appropriate non-adherent dressing if required. Continue use until the wound has fully re-epithelialized.

description: DERMAGEN Lunatox is a 50 g brightening cream formulated with 5% niacinamide, tranexamic acid, glutathione, hyaluronic acid, and alpha-lipoic acid to target melanin overproduction and uneven skin tone. Niacinamide inhibits melanosome transfer to keratinocytes, tranexamic acid blocks the plasmin-mediated activation of arachidonic acid in the melanin synthesis pathway, and glutathione exerts a dual inhibitory effect on tyrosinase activity. The hyaluronic acid base supports sustained epidermal hydration during daily brightening use.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply a thin layer to thoroughly cleansed skin morning and evening, focusing on areas of uneven tone, hyperpigmentation, or dark spots, then gently pat in until fully absorbed before applying sunscreen or the next care step. Consistent daily use over 4 to 8 weeks is recommended for visible brightening results. Pair with SPF50+ sun protection every morning.

description: DERMAGEN Cicarown Cream is a 50 g cooling and hydration cream formulated with Centella Asiatica extract, aloe vera extract, shea butter, ceramide complex, EGF, FGF, tocopherol, and hyaluronic acid. The combination of growth factors (EGF and FGF) supports epidermal renewal, while ceramides rebuild the intercellular lipid barrier, and aloe vera with Centella Asiatica provide immediate anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The formulation is designed for instant cooling relief on stressed, irritated, or post-procedure skin.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply an appropriate amount to thoroughly cleansed skin as needed for cooling and hydration support, gently massaging across the face and neck until fully absorbed. May be used morning and evening as the moisturizing step in the daily routine, or applied as a targeted soothing treatment on reactive or post-procedure areas.

description: DERMAGEN Cindelria Tone-Up Cream is a multifunctional daily finishing cream with SPF50+ PA++++ broad-spectrum UV protection, formulated with Centella Asiatica, Aloe Vera, Shea Butter, Ceramide Complex, EGF, FGF, Vitamin E, and Hyaluronic Acid to combine active barrier repair and skin renewal with a soft-focus pink tone-up effect. EGF and FGF support epidermal cell turnover and collagen synthesis, while ceramides reinforce barrier integrity and the UV filters protect against photodamage. The 40 mL format is suited for both daily home use and in-clinic dispensing after procedures.
protocol: For daily use after cleansing, toning, and serum application. Dispense a small pearl-sized amount and apply evenly across the face and neck as the closing morning skincare step, ensuring thorough coverage of sun-exposed areas. Reapply approximately every two hours during prolonged outdoor exposure or after sweating to maintain continuous UV protection.

description: DERMAGEN Bichaeahn Pore Toning Cream is an 80 g tannin-complex targeted cream formulated with Copper Tripeptide-1, Hamamelis Virginiana (witch hazel) extract, glutathione, niacinamide, and Hippophae Rhamnoides (sea buckthorn) fruit water to refine the appearance of enlarged pores and support a brighter, more even-toned complexion. Witch hazel tannins act as an astringent to temporarily tighten pore walls, while copper tripeptide-1 promotes collagen synthesis to structurally firm the perifolicular dermis over time. Niacinamide and glutathione address surface tone unevenness and inhibit melanin transfer.
protocol: For professional or daily home use. Apply an even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin, focusing on regions with visibly enlarged pores. May be used morning and evening as the moisturizing step or incorporated into post-procedure regimens once the skin barrier has fully stabilized, per practitioner judgment. Consistent use over 4 to 8 weeks is recommended for pore-toning results.

description: DERMAGEN Cellsia Post-Laser Regenerating Cream (60 g) is a specialist recovery cream formulated with EGF, FGF, ceramide complex, copper tripeptide-1, and shea butter to support rapid barrier restoration and epidermal regeneration following ablative or non-ablative laser procedures. Growth factors EGF and FGF stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis, ceramides rebuild the disrupted lipid barrier, and copper tripeptide-1 supports organized tissue repair and anti-inflammatory recovery. The 60 g size is calibrated for individual patient post-procedure dispensing.
protocol: For professional clinic dispensing and home use. Apply a thin even layer to gently cleansed skin immediately following the in-clinic procedure and throughout the recovery period. Reapply two to three times daily or as directed by the treating practitioner. Continue for a minimum of 7 to 14 days post-treatment until skin barrier has fully re-established.

description: DERMAGEN Cellsia Post-Laser Regenerating Cream (500 g) is the clinic-size format of the same post-procedure barrier-restoration and regeneration cream formulated with EGF, FGF, ceramide complex, copper tripeptide-1, and shea butter. Designed for high-volume professional environments, the 500 g tube provides sufficient product for multi-patient protocols or extended clinic use. Growth factors support cellular renewal, ceramides rebuild the intercellular lipid matrix, and the anti-inflammatory actives minimize post-procedure erythema and discomfort.
protocol: For professional clinic use. Decant individual-patient portions hygienically using sterile spatulas or dispensers to maintain product integrity. Apply a thin even layer to cleansed post-procedure skin and advise patients to reapply two to three times daily throughout the recovery period. Clinical replacement of dispensed portions should follow standard infection-control procedures.

description: DERMAGEN EZCera Cream is a 200 g medical depigmenting cream formulated with 4% hydroquinone as the principal melanin-suppressing agent. Hydroquinone competitively inhibits tyrosinase, the rate-limiting enzyme in melanin biosynthesis, effectively reducing melanin production and lightening hyperpigmented lesions including melasma, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, freckles, and solar lentigines. The large-format tube supports both supervised in-clinic and home maintenance use.
protocol: Apply a thin layer to affected areas 1 to 2 times daily (morning and evening). Use broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen during daytime throughout the treatment course to prevent UV-triggered re-pigmentation and protect existing results. Hydroquinone therapy is typically conducted in supervised 8 to 12 week cycles; treatment should be interrupted if signs of ochronosis or exogenous irritation develop. Consult a practitioner before extended use.

description: EXOSIA Skin Booster Part 1 is a lyophilized powder containing 49.2 billion umbilical cord blood stem cell-derived exosomes per vial, supplying a high-density concentration of growth factors, mRNA, and signalling molecules that stimulate fibroblast activity, support collagen synthesis, and promote skin regeneration. The freeze-dried format preserves exosome bioactivity until reconstitution and is designed for combination with the EXOSIA Part 2 activator solution or sterile pyrogen-free saline before intradermal or topical delivery. Supplied as 10 vials x 2 mL.
protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Reconstitute one vial of Part 1 powder with the corresponding EXOSIA Part 2 activator solution (or sterile saline) and administer via intradermal mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle or via MTS microneedling at 0.5–1.0 mm depth. Initial course: one session per week for 3 weeks, followed by monthly maintenance sessions. Combine both Parts 1 and 2 in the same session for the full 98.4 billion exosome dose.

description: EXOSIA Skin Booster Part 2 is a 61-in-1 activator solution containing hyaluronic acid (5 types), 20 amino acids, 8 essential vitamins, and 7 complex peptides, formulated to serve as both the reconstitution vehicle for EXOSIA Part 1 exosome powder and as a standalone biorevitalization cocktail. The multi-ingredient blend supports effective delivery and cellular uptake of the stem cell-derived exosomes while independently providing deep hydration, antioxidant protection, and peptide-mediated collagen stimulation. Supplied as 10 vials x 5 mL.
protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Add the contents of one Part 2 vial to one Part 1 exosome vial immediately before treatment. Administer the combined preparation via intradermal injection using a 30–32G needle (nappage or serial puncture technique) or deliver topically following MTS microneedling at 0.5–1.0 mm depth. Recommended session schedule: weekly for 3 sessions, then monthly maintenance. Part 2 may also be used as a standalone biorevitalization booster.

description: GTM EXOMELA is a professional exosome-based skin booster system combining 180 mg freeze-dried EXO Signal 1000 Powder (conditioned media derived exosomes) with 5 mL Mela Vital Solution containing PDRN, tranexamic acid, glutathione, peptides, amino acids, and hyaluronic acid, specifically formulated to target hyperpigmentation, dullness, and loss of firmness. Tranexamic acid inhibits melanin synthesis via the plasmin-arachidonic acid pathway, glutathione suppresses tyrosinase activity, while PDRN and growth factor-rich exosomes stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen remodelling. Supplied as 5 treatment sets per box.
protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Reconstitute the EXO Signal 1000 Powder with the Mela Vital Solution immediately before treatment. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle (serial puncture or nappage technique) or apply topically following MTS microneedling at 0.5–1.0 mm depth across the treatment area. Recommended course: 3 to 4 weekly sessions, followed by monthly maintenance. Apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ post-treatment.

description: GTM PDRN Mask is a 35 mL professional sheet mask for the face and neck formulated with 3.5% PDRN (polydeoxyribonucleotide, salmon DNA extract) to promote tissue repair, support skin barrier hydration, and reduce post-procedure sensitivity. PDRN activates the adenosine A2A receptor pathway to stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis, while the high-essence sheet format ensures prolonged skin contact for maximum absorption. Supplied as a box of 10 individually packaged masks.
protocol: For professional or home use following aesthetic procedures or as a weekly treatment. Apply one sheet mask to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave in place for 15 to 20 minutes. Remove the sheet and gently pat any remaining essence into the skin until absorbed, then follow with recovery cream or SPF as appropriate. For post-procedure use, apply 2 to 3 sessions per week during the first 2 weeks of recovery.

description: GTM GOLD CELL PLUS is a bio-revitalizing injectable skin booster containing 5% PDRN (salmon DNA extract), 5% hyaluronic acid, and 2% glutathione in a sterile 3.3 mL vial format. PDRN activates the adenosine A2A receptor to stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis, hyaluronic acid delivers deep intradermal hydration and volumizing support, and glutathione exerts antioxidant brightening effects by inhibiting tyrosinase. Supplied as 10 vials x 3.3 mL per box.
protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle with serial puncture, nappage, or micro-bolus technique at 1–2 mm depth into the superficial to mid-dermis. Inject 0.02–0.05 mL per point across the treatment area. Recommended course: 3 to 4 sessions at 2-week intervals, then monthly maintenance. Results are typically noticeable after 2 to 3 sessions.

description: GTM GOLD CELL THE PREMIUM is a professional-grade injectable skin booster for bio-revitalization delivered in 5 mL vials, combining PDRN (salmon DNA extract) and glutathione in a concentration optimized for brightening-focused skin rejuvenation protocols. PDRN acts via adenosine A2A receptor stimulation to enhance collagen remodelling and tissue repair, while glutathione inhibits tyrosinase and reduces oxidative stress-driven melanin production for a more uniform, luminous complexion. Supplied as 10 vials x 5 mL per box.
protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle (serial puncture, nappage, or linear threading technique) at 1–2 mm depth in the superficial dermis. Dose 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point across the treatment zone. Recommended schedule: 3 to 4 sessions at 2-week intervals for the initial course, followed by monthly maintenance. Combine with post-treatment SPF50+ application.

description: MELACELL THE PREMIUM is a specialized injectable skin booster in a 5 mL vial format, designed as an intensive brightening and skin-regeneration solution combining melanin-suppressing actives with biostimulatory ingredients for advanced pigmentation and dullness correction. The formulation targets both surface and deep-dermal pigmentation while stimulating collagen synthesis and improving overall skin vitality through a multi-mechanism approach. Supplied as 10 vials x 5 mL per box.
protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle with serial puncture or nappage technique at 1–2 mm depth in the superficial to mid-dermis. Dose 0.02–0.05 mL per point across the treatment area. Initial course: 3 to 4 weekly or bi-weekly sessions; monthly maintenance thereafter. Apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ post-treatment to prevent photoreactivation of pigmentation.

description: MELACELL+ is an advanced brightening injectable skin booster containing 3% tranexamic acid and a peptide complex as key actives, further enriched with niacinamide, PDRN, glutathione, amino acids, and hyaluronic acid in a sterile 3.5 mL vial. Tranexamic acid at 3% blocks the plasmin-arachidonic acid melanin activation pathway, niacinamide inhibits melanosome transfer to keratinocytes, and glutathione acts as a tyrosinase inhibitor, delivering a triple-mechanism approach to melasma, hyperpigmentation, and uneven tone. PDRN provides simultaneous tissue regeneration and collagen stimulation. Supplied as 10 vials x 3.5 mL per box.
protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners via MTS microneedling or mesotherapy. Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle with serial puncture or nappage technique, or apply topically immediately following microneedling at 0.5–1.0 mm depth. Dose 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point. Recommended course: 4 to 6 sessions at 1 to 2-week intervals for melasma and hyperpigmentation protocols; monthly maintenance thereafter. Apply SPF50+ sunscreen post-treatment.

description: GTM Balance Cleansing Gel is a 150 mL gentle foaming gel cleanser formulated with botanical extracts to remove impurities and excess sebum while maintaining the skin's natural moisture and pH balance. The formula delivers a soothing and refreshing cleanse suited to normal, oily, combination, and sensitive skin types, effectively clearing clogged pores without disrupting the epidermal barrier. Suitable for daily use in both home care and pre-procedure skin preparation.
protocol: For daily use. Wet the face with lukewarm water, apply a small amount of gel to damp skin, and massage gently in circular motions across the face and neck for 30 to 60 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat dry. Follow with toner and the subsequent skincare routine. May be used as the pre-treatment cleansing step in clinic protocols before procedure application.

description: PDRENZA Serum is a 50 mL intensive rejuvenation serum for hydration, brightening, and wrinkle care formulated with PDRN, NMN (nicotinamide mononucleotide), Pearl Tomato extract, 5 ceramide types, 7 hyaluronic acid forms, 25 peptides, caviar extract, niacinamide, and adenosine. PDRN stimulates fibroblast-mediated collagen synthesis, NMN supports cellular energy metabolism and DNA repair, and the 7-type hyaluronic acid complex delivers multi-depth hydration from the surface stratum corneum to the superficial dermis. The 25-peptide matrix targets fine lines, firmness, and skin elasticity.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply 3 to 5 drops to thoroughly cleansed skin morning and evening, gently pressing and patting across the face and neck until fully absorbed. Follow immediately with a suitable moisturizer or occlusive to seal in active ingredients. Use consistently twice daily for a minimum of 4 to 8 weeks for measurable improvement in elasticity, hydration, and fine lines.

description: PDRENZA Cream is a 50 mL moisturizing anti-aging cream formulated with PDRN, NMN, Pearl Tomato extract, niacinamide, and adenosine to deliver simultaneous brightening, firming, and smoothing benefits. NMN replenishes cellular NAD+ levels to support mitochondrial function and DNA repair in aging skin cells, adenosine acts on adenosine receptors to stimulate collagen synthesis and reduce fine line depth, and niacinamide inhibits melanosome transfer to keratinocytes for tone correction. The cream serves as the moisturizing and sealing step within the PDRENZA regimen.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply an even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin both morning and evening as the closing moisturizing step of the skincare routine, after serum application. Massage gently across the face and neck until fully absorbed. Use consistently as part of the PDRENZA system alongside the matching serum for enhanced synergistic results.

description: GTM MELA DUAL Day & Night Cream is a 75 mL dual-chamber brightening and rejuvenating cream formulated with PDRN, NMN, Pearl Tomato extract, retinol (night formula), niacinamide, and adenosine for targeted day and overnight skin renewal. The day formula addresses dullness and uneven tone through PDRN-stimulated collagen support and niacinamide-mediated melanosome inhibition, while the night formula adds retinol to accelerate epidermal cell turnover and improve texture during the circadian skin repair cycle. The dual-chamber design prevents active cross-contamination between the AM and PM formulas.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply the day formula (labelled AM chamber) each morning to cleansed skin as the closing moisturizing step, followed by broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen. Apply the night formula (PM chamber) each evening after cleansing and serum application as the final skin-preparation step before sleep. Use both chambers consistently every day and night for optimal visible results over 4 to 8 weeks.

description: VITA-K Repair Cream is a 30 mL multi-functional post-treatment facial cream combining synthetic menadione (vitamin K3 analogue) with natural vitamin K sourced from cabbage, spinach, broccoli, and mugwort leaf extracts. Vitamin K supports the resolution of superficial bruising and post-procedure erythema by facilitating platelet aggregation and capillary integrity at the treatment site, while the botanical extracts deliver additional soothing and anti-inflammatory support for sensitive, reactive skin. The formula is suited for targeted application to areas of bruising, persistent redness, or post-procedure sensitivity.
protocol: For professional dispensing or home use. Apply a thin even layer to thoroughly cleansed, sensitive or bruised areas as needed for soothing support, gently pressing in until absorbed. May be applied two to three times daily in the acute post-procedure phase, particularly after injection treatments where bruising is likely. Continue until erythema, bruising, or sensitivity has resolved.

description: GTM Collagen Serum is a 50 mL elasticity and hydration serum formulated with 7 collagen types, a hyaluronic acid complex, a 10-peptide matrix, PDRN, NMN, Pearl Tomato extract, niacinamide, and adenosine. The 7-collagen blend delivers surface film-forming, barrier-support, and dermal fibroblast stimulation through complementary molecular weights, while the 10-peptide matrix targets multiple stages of collagen synthesis and matrix metalloproteinase inhibition to preserve structural integrity. NMN and PDRN further support cellular energetics and adenosine A2A receptor-mediated collagen remodelling.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply a small amount of serum to thoroughly cleansed skin morning and evening, patting in gently across the face and neck until fully absorbed. Follow immediately with a suitable moisturizer to seal in active ingredients. Use consistently twice daily for a minimum of 4 to 8 weeks for measurable improvement in elasticity, firmness, and hydration depth.

description: T-TOX PEEL 6 SET is a professional spicule-based peeling system comprising T-TOX Powder (deep-sea bio-silica spicules, 1 g per vial) and T-TOX Solution (10 mL per vial), supplied as 6 treatment sets with mixing caps. The bio-silica spicules physically penetrate the stratum corneum to create controlled micro-channels, mechanically remove desquamating corneocytes, stimulate epidermal regeneration, and dramatically enhance the transdermal delivery of subsequent active ingredients. The system targets dull skin, uneven texture, enlarged pores, and acne-prone or congested skin through a single in-clinic session.
protocol: For professional in-clinic use only. Cleanse skin and apply toner. Weigh out 0.5 to 1.0 g of T-TOX Powder (adjust by treatment intensity) and mix thoroughly with T-TOX Solution in the supplied bowl using a mixing cap. Apply evenly to the face and cover with wet gauze for 15 to 20 minutes. Remove gently with wet cotton or gauze and apply a soothing recovery ampoule. Repeat sessions every 2 to 4 weeks; a course of 4 to 6 sessions is recommended for optimal resurfacing results.

description: T-TOX PEEL Mini is a trial or single-client-course format of the professional deep-sea bio-silica spicule peeling system, supplied as T-TOX Powder (1 g per vial x 2) and T-TOX Solution (10 mL per vial x 2) with mixing caps. The bio-silica spicules penetrate the stratum corneum to mechanically exfoliate desquamating corneocytes, create micro-channels for enhanced active ingredient delivery, and stimulate epidermal renewal without chemical ablation. Suited for introductory protocols, single-patient trial treatments, or travel-format clinic use.
protocol: For professional in-clinic use only. Cleanse skin and apply toner. Mix 0.5 to 1.0 g of T-TOX Powder with T-TOX Solution in the mixing bowl (adjust concentration to skin sensitivity). Apply evenly to the face and cover with wet gauze for 15 to 20 minutes. Remove gently with wet cotton or gauze, then apply a soothing recovery ampoule. Treat every 2 to 4 weeks as needed.

description: PEPTICULE ULTIMATE REJUVENATION CREAM is a 50 mL premium spa-grade nourishing facial cream formulated with an advanced peptide complex and encapsulated gold capsules to support collagen synthesis, improve skin firmness, and refine texture. The peptide complex targets multiple matrix proteins involved in skin structural integrity, while the gold capsules provide bioavailable actives that promote a luminous, radiant appearance. The cream is designed as the final step of the PEPTICULE rejuvenation system, sealing in prior treatment layers.
protocol: For professional or daily home use. Apply an even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin as the closing step of the routine, both morning and evening, after serum or ampoule application. Massage gently across the face and neck until fully absorbed. For best results, pair with the PEPTICULE Ultimate Rejuvenation Serum and use consistently over a minimum of 4 to 8 weeks.

description: PEPTICULE ULTIMATE REJUVENATION SERUM is an advanced 10 mL ampoule combining retinol derivatives, hydrogel spicules, and Phyto PDRN in a peptide-rich matrix to address skin elasticity, surface texture, and overall radiance. The hydrogel spicules create micro-channels for enhanced transdermal delivery of the active payload, retinol derivatives accelerate epidermal cell turnover and collagen synthesis, and Phyto PDRN (plant-derived DNA extract) supports tissue regeneration through adenosine receptor-pathway stimulation. Supplied as 3 ampoules x 10 mL per box.
protocol: For professional or home use. Open one ampoule and apply the contents to thoroughly cleansed skin, spreading evenly across the face and neck. Allow the serum to absorb fully before following with the PEPTICULE Ultimate Rejuvenation Cream as the sealing step. Treatment frequency should be determined per clinic protocol and individual skin tolerance, typically 2 to 3 times per week for an active phase. Avoid eye contact; use SPF protection when using retinol derivatives.

description: GTM Active Protect Sun Serum is a 50 mL lightweight SPF50+ PA++++ anti-UV serum that provides broad-spectrum UVA and UVB protection in a fluid, fast-absorbing serum texture. The formula combines chemical UV filters with soothing botanical actives to defend against photodamage, support daily hydration, and maintain a more even-looking complexion under sun exposure. The non-greasy serum finish is suited to oily, combination, and post-procedure skin types that benefit from UV protection without heavy cosmetic texture.
protocol: For daily home use. Apply an even layer to thoroughly cleansed and moisturized skin as the closing morning skincare step before going outdoors. Ensure uniform coverage across the face and neck. Reapply every two hours during prolonged outdoor exposure, after sweating, or after towelling, using approximately a teaspoon-sized amount for the full face. May be applied over makeup using a gentle pressing motion.

description: GTM Aloe Soothing Gel is a 500 mL moisturizing facial and body gel containing aloe vera leaf extract (Aloe Barbadensis) as its principal active, formulated to soothe, hydrate, and comfort dry and sensitive skin after cleansing, sun exposure, or environmental stress. Aloe vera delivers polysaccharide-mediated moisture retention, prostaglandin-inhibiting anti-inflammatory action, and light occlusive film formation to support the skin's natural moisture barrier across face, neck, and body. The large-format bottle is suited for both daily personal use and in-clinic dispensing as a post-procedure calming step.
protocol: For daily home or clinic use. Apply a generous layer to thoroughly cleansed skin as often as needed for soothing and moisture support across the face, neck, or body. Massage gently until fully absorbed, or leave as a thin film for enhanced moisture retention. Particularly effective when applied to sun-exposed or post-treatment areas. May be refrigerated for enhanced cooling relief after laser or IPL procedures.

description: ROSE HERB TONER is a 500 mL hydrating daily facial toner featuring Rosa Centifolia (Provence rose) extract as the principal active, formulated to establish an effective moisture-preparation layer and support surface texture refinement as the first post-cleanse step of the skincare routine. Rose water provides natural flavonoid-based antioxidant activity and mild astringency that tightens the perifolicular pore margin and tones surface skin texture. The formula leaves a non-sticky, fresh finish that primes the skin for optimal serum and moisturizer absorption.
protocol: For daily home or clinic use. After cleansing, apply the toner to a cotton pad or directly to clean palms, then gently press and pat evenly onto the face and neck until absorbed. Follow immediately with serum, ampoule, or moisturizer while the skin is still slightly damp to maximize active ingredient absorption. May be used as a pre-treatment prep step before in-clinic mesotherapy or micro-needling procedures.

description: BEAUTY MONSTER BLACK is a professional-grade plasma pen device using controlled arc-discharge plasma energy to vaporize superficial skin tissue without direct contact, stimulating fibroblast activity and collagen remodelling via fibroblast therapy. The device includes 10 plasma tips, 1 fractional tip for plasma mesotherapy and pigmentation treatment, and 1 thermal tip for deeper skin tightening, covering a range of indications from skin tag and milia removal to eyelid lifting and non-surgical blepharoplasty. Four adjustable power levels and interchangeable SUS316 surgical-grade tips enable precise treatment customization.
protocol: For professional in-clinic use only by trained and certified operators. Select the appropriate tip (plasma for spot removal/lifting, fractional for pigmentation/pore treatment, thermal for tightening). Apply topical anaesthetic cream 30 to 45 minutes before treatment. Set to the lowest effective power level and deliver controlled plasma arcs in a uniform grid pattern, 1 to 2 mm apart, without direct skin contact. Do not overlap treatment points in the same session. Apply a post-treatment calming cream immediately after. Schedule sessions at minimum 6 to 8 week intervals.

description: O2TODERM LED PLUS is a professional in-clinic dual-modality device combining Oxygen and Anion Therapy with Photo Dynamic Therapy delivered via five selectable LED wavelengths: red (630 nm, collagen stimulation), yellow (590 nm, brightening and lymphatic support), blue (415 nm, acne and sebum control), green (520 nm, calming and melanin reduction), and near-infrared (880 nm, deep tissue penetration). The integrated oxygen delivery system enhances transepidermal absorption of topically applied active ingredients while anion therapy supports skin surface ionization and rejuvenation. Supplied as a set including the ULDM ultrasound module.
protocol: For trained operator in-clinic use. Select the appropriate LED wavelength and intensity setting per the target indication. Deliver treatment at a distance of 5 to 10 cm from the skin surface for 15 to 30 minutes per session. Apply oxygen therapy in conjunction with active serums or masks for enhanced product infusion. Typical course: 2 sessions per week for 4 to 6 weeks. Calibrate device settings according to the manufacturer's technical manual and configure per patient indication before each use.

description: ULDM (Ultra + Dynamic Massage) is a professional four-channel high-density collimated ultrasound device operating at selectable frequencies of 1 MHz, 3 MHz, 10 MHz, and 18 MHz for multi-depth skin lifting, tightening, collagen regeneration, and post-treatment calming. Lower frequencies (1–3 MHz) penetrate to the deep dermis and SMAS layer to stimulate thermally-mediated collagen contraction and neo-collagenesis, while higher frequencies (10–18 MHz) work at the superficial dermal level for texture refinement and soothing. The high-density collimation ensures focused energy delivery with minimal scatter to surrounding tissues.
protocol: For trained operator in-clinic use only. Apply a generous layer of ultrasound coupling gel to the treatment area and select the appropriate frequency per depth target: 1–3 MHz for deep lifting and SMAS stimulation, 10–18 MHz for superficial rejuvenation. Deliver in slow, overlapping even passes at the recommended intensity setting per the manufacturer's protocol. Treat one zone at a time for 5 to 10 minutes per area. Typical course: monthly sessions for collagen stimulation; 2-weekly sessions during an active tightening protocol. Calibrate and configure device settings before each use.
